sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness, particularly when standing, for the past week. He denies chest pain, shortness of breath, or syncope. The patient reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm, regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable, with no focal deficits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for orthostatic hypotension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order a tilt table test to evaluate for orthostatic intolerance. I will also recommend increasing fluid intake and avoiding rapid position changes.
